title: psorodendron kingii
intro: Psorodendron kingii, also known as the king's cancer plant, is a type of succulent plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Psorodendron kingii include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as acne, eczema, and wounds, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into salves, creams, or tinctures to be applied topically or taken internally, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
